summary: Corpus expansion Tier 1 вЂ” source the floating cohesion-critical concepts (Plato, Dionysius, Iamblichus, Heart Sutra, Dhammapada)
description:
## Goal

Source four taxonomy concepts that are **defined-but-floating** in the corpus today (no primary source backing them):

| Floating concept | Source that fixes it | Child |
|---|---|---|
| `demiurge`, `numerical_mysticism` | Plato вЂ” Timaeus | 1 |
| `anamnesis`, `body_as_obstacle`, `soul_migration` | Plato вЂ” Phaedo | 2 |
| `divine_madness`, `ladder_of_love`, `spiritual_ascent` | Plato вЂ” Phaedrus | 3 |
| (cross-tradition illusion/awakening node) | Plato вЂ” Republic VIвЂ“VII (Cave + Good) | 4 |
| `apophatic_theology` | Pseudo-Dionysius вЂ” Mystical Theology + Divine Names | 5 |
| `theurgy`, `cosmic_sympathy` | Iamblichus вЂ” On the Mysteries | 6 |
| `sunyata_emptiness` | Heart Sutra | 7 |
| (broad ethical-psychological backbone) | Dhammapada | 8 |

## Net corpus effect

- platonism: 1 в†’ 5 sources
- christian_mysticism: gains its apophatic urtext (upstream of Eckhart already held)
- neoplatonism: gains its theurgy primary (the pro-theurgy answer to anti-theurgy Plotinus already held)
- buddhism: 1 в†’ 3 sources (Diamond Sutra + Heart Sutra + Dhammapada)

## Sequence

The 4 Plato children share the Jowett translation pattern в†’ do them as a block. Then Dionysius + Iamblichus (apophatic + theurgy bridge). Then Heart Sutra + Dhammapada (Buddhism rescue). All children are pipeline-tolerant вЂ” no shared file conflicts, can run in parallel.

## Out of scope

- **Pistis Sophia** вЂ” added to `docs/corpus-expansion-candidates.md` В§4.12 on 2026-06-03; user is reviewing; do NOT include here.
- **Tier 2 sources** (Masnavi IIвЂ“VI, Attar, Shabistari, Gilgamesh, Adapa, Platform Sutra, Cloud of Unknowing, Theologia Germanica, Porphyry, Proclus, SBE11 Suttas) вЂ” separate ticket later.
- **Upanishads bulk acquire** вЂ” separate ticket, paused per `[[project_upanishads_bulk_deferred]]` memory.

## References

- `docs/corpus-expansion-candidates.md` В§3 (full per-source detail)
- `sources/manifest.toml` (append target)
- `chunking/{platonism,christian_mysticism,neoplatonism,buddhism}/` (config target)

resolution.note:
All 8 children closed. Net Tier 1 corpus impact:

  ae2b6323 Plato: Timaeus              50 chunks
  6689fda7 Plato: Phaedo               44 chunks
  a096de86 Plato: Phaedrus             38 chunks
  77ffce7d Plato: Republic VIвЂ“VII     37 chunks (4 sub-pages)
  d7c3ccef Pseudo-Dionysius           134 chunks (MT + 13 DN)
  d02d2ec8 Iamblichus: On the Mysteries  218 chunks
  320d958a Heart Sutra                  3 chunks (2 recensions)
  62b5d6c1 Dhammapada                 66 chunks (26 chapters)
  в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  Total Tier 1 chunks added:        590 chunks

Sourced four floating taxonomy concepts: demiurge + numerical_mysticism
(Timaeus), anamnesis + body_as_obstacle + soul_migration (Phaedo),
divine_madness + ladder_of_love (Phaedrus), apophatic_theology
(Dionysius), theurgy + cosmic_sympathy (Iamblichus), sunyata_emptiness
(Heart Sutra). Plus Cave/Form-of-the-Good as cross-tradition awakening
node and Dhammapada as broad ethical-psychological backbone.

Tradition growth:
  platonism:           1 в†’ 5 sources  (Symposium + 4 new)
  christian_mysticism: +14 sources (Dionysius MT + 13 DN chapters)
  neoplatonism:        +1 source  (Iamblichus)
  buddhism:            1 в†’ 4 sources  (Diamond + HeartГ—2 + Dhammapada)

All work shipped on corpus-expansion-tickets branch вЂ” no merge to main
yet; PR open for review. Embed deferred to bulk pass.
